# Critiquing specific types of articles <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Original research

- Applying trustworthiness assessment methods to original empirical articles

## Meta-analyses

- Specific considerations when assessing trustworthiness of meta-analytic studies

## RCTs

- Specific considerations when assessing trustworthiness of randomised controlled trials
